    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AccountDashboardDTO
    DTO representing a combined account dashboard with performance records, risk measures, and compliance breaches.
    AnalyticsController
    API contract for the Analytics-Service.
    AnalyticsControllerImpl
    REST controller implementation for AnalyticsController.
    AnalyticsService
    Service interface defining all analytics business operations: performance calculations, risk assessments, compliance breach detection and lifecycle.
    AnalyticsServiceApplication
    Main application class for the Analytics-Service.
    AnalyticsServiceImpl
    Implementation of AnalyticsService containing simulated core business logic for: Daily and monthly return calculations Risk assessment (volatility, drawdown, VaR, tracking error) Compliance breach detection and lifecycle management
    BreachStatus
     
    ComplianceBreach
    JPA entity representing a compliance breach detected during scanning.
    ComplianceBreachRepository
    JPA repository for ComplianceBreach entities.
    ComplianceBreachResponseDTO
    Response DTO for compliance breach data.
    GlobalExceptionHandler
    Global exception handler for the Analytics-Service.
    LoggingAspect
    Centralized AOP Logging Aspect for the Analytics-Service.
    MeasureType
    Types of risk measures computed during risk assessment.
    ModelMapperConfiguration
    ModelMapper configuration for the Analytics-Service.
    OpenApiConfiguration
    OpenAPI / Swagger configuration for the Analytics-Service.
    PerformanceRecord
    JPA entity storing portfolio performance return records.
    PerformanceRecordRepository
    JPA repository for PerformanceRecord entities.
    PerformanceRecordResponseDTO
    Response DTO for performance record data.
    Period
     
    ResourceAlreadyExistsException
    Thrown when creating a resource that already exists.
    ResourceNotFoundException
    Thrown when a requested resource cannot be found.
    RiskMeasure
    JPA entity storing risk measure calculations for a portfolio.
    RiskMeasureRepository
    JPA repository for RiskMeasure entities.
    RiskMeasureResponseDTO
    Response DTO for risk measure data.
    Severity
